testcase.name: test_grooming_intent_detection

failure.message:
AssertionError: Expected 'Grooming' pillar for 'Looking for a groomer', got 'General' assert 'General' == 'Grooming'
- Grooming + General

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_handoff_pillar.py:200: in test_grooming_intent_detection assert data.get("pillar") == "Grooming", f"Expected 'Grooming' pillar for '{utterance}', got '{data.get('pillar')}'" E AssertionError: Expected 'Grooming' pillar for 'Looking for a groomer', got 'General' E assert 'General' == 'Grooming' E E - Grooming E + General
